edges: API Gateway → Rate Limiter : check quota() (message)
Rate Limiter → API Gateway : quota ok (reply)
API Gateway → Backend Service : forward request() (message)
Rate Limiter → API Gateway : quota exceeded (reply)
API Gateway → Client : 429 too many requests (reply)

finalCode:
@startuml
actor Client
participant "API Gateway" as Gateway
participant "Rate Limiter" as RateLimiter
participant "Backend Service" as Backend

loop up to 3 retries
  Client -> Gateway: requestData()
  Gateway -> RateLimiter: checkQuota(client)
  alt quota available
    RateLimiter --> Gateway: quotaAvailable
    Gateway -> Backend: forwardRequest()
    Backend --> Gateway: data
    Gateway --> Client: data
  else quota exhausted
    RateLimiter --> Gateway: quotaExhausted
    Gateway --> Client: 429 Too Many Requests
    Client -> Client: waitBackoff()
  end
end
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor Client
  participant Gateway as API Gateway
  participant Limiter as Rate Limiter
  participant Backend as Backend Service

  loop up to 3 retries
    Client->>Gateway: requestData()
    Gateway->>Limiter: checkQuota()
    alt quota available
      Limiter-->>Gateway: quotaAvailable
      Gateway->>Backend: forwardRequest()
      Backend-->>Gateway: data
      Gateway-->>Client: data
    else quota exhausted
      Limiter-->>Gateway: quotaExhausted
      Gateway-->>Client: tooManyRequests
      Client->>Client: waitBackoff()
    end
  end

@startuml
actor Client
participant "API Gateway" as Gateway
participant "Token Cache" as Cache
participant "Authentication Service" as Auth
participant "Order Service" as Order

Client -> Gateway: callOrderEndpoint(JWT)
Gateway -> Cache: checkToken(JWT)

alt no cache entry
  Cache --> Gateway: cacheMiss
  Gateway -> Auth: verifyToken(JWT)
  Auth --> Gateway: verificationResult
  Gateway -> Cache: storeToken(JWT, verificationResult)
else cache entry found
  Cache --> Gateway: cachedResult

  Gateway -> Order: forwardRequest()
  Order --> Gateway: orderList

else token invalid

  alt cache entry exists

    Auth-->>Gateway: verificationResult
    Gateway->>Cache: storeResult(JWT, verificationResult)

  alt token valid

@startuml
actor Customer
participant "Order Service" as OrderService
participant "Saga Orchestrator" as Orchestrator
participant "Warehouse Service" as Warehouse
participant "Payment Service" as Payment
participant "Shipment Service" as Shipment
participant "Event Log" as EventLog

Customer -> OrderService: placeOrder()
create Orchestrator
OrderService -> Orchestrator: createSagaOrchestrator()

Orchestrator ->> EventLog: logStep(reserveItems)
Orchestrator -> Warehouse: reserveItems()
Warehouse --> Orchestrator: reservationResult

alt goods available
  Orchestrator ->> EventLog: logStep(executePayment)
  Orchestrator -> Payment: executePayment()
  Payment --> Orchestrator: paymentResult

  alt payment successful
    Orchestrator ->> EventLog: logStep(commissionShipment)
    Orchestrator -> Shipment: commissionShipment()
    Shipment --> Orchestrator: shipmentResult
  else payment failed
    Orchestrator ->> EventLog: logStep(cancelReservation)
    Orchestrator -> Warehouse: cancelReservation()
    Warehouse --> Orchestrator: cancellationConfirmed
  end
else goods not available
  Orchestrator ->> EventLog: logStep(transactionAborted)
end

destroy Orchestrator
OrderService --> Customer: orderStatus
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor Customer
  participant OrderService
  participant EventLog
  participant WarehouseService
  participant PaymentService
  participant ShipmentService

  Customer->>OrderService: placeOrder()
  create participant Orchestrator
  OrderService->>Orchestrator: instantiate()
  par
    Orchestrator->>EventLog: writeStep(orderCreated)
  and
    Orchestrator->>WarehouseService: reserveItems()
  end
  WarehouseService-->>Orchestrator: reservationResult

  alt goods available
    par
      Orchestrator->>EventLog: writeStep(itemsReserved)
    and
      Orchestrator->>PaymentService: executePayment()
    end
    PaymentService-->>Orchestrator: paymentResult

    alt payment succeeds
      par
        Orchestrator->>EventLog: writeStep(paymentExecuted)
      and
        Orchestrator->>ShipmentService: commissionShipment()
      end
      ShipmentService-->>Orchestrator: shipmentResult
      Orchestrator->>EventLog: writeStep(shipmentCommissioned)
    else payment fails
      par
        Orchestrator->>EventLog: writeStep(paymentFailed)
      and
        Orchestrator->>WarehouseService: cancelReservation()
      end
      WarehouseService-->>Orchestrator: cancellationConfirmed
    end
  else goods not available
    Orchestrator->>EventLog: writeStep(transactionAborted)
  end

  destroy Orchestrator
  Orchestrator-->>OrderService: orderStatus
  OrderService-->>Customer: orderStatus

Authorization Server → Session Store : create session(process) (message)

Authorization Server → User : issue authorization code (message)

Authorization Server → Audit Log : note issuance() (message)

Authorization Server → User : show error message (message)

@startuml
actor User
participant "Client Application" as Client
participant "Authorization Server" as AuthServer
participant "Session Store" as SessionStore
participant "Audit Log" as AuditLog
participant "Resource Server" as ResourceServer

User -> Client: initiate login
Client -> AuthServer: redirect via browser

create SessionStore
AuthServer -> SessionStore: create session

AuthServer --> User: deliver login form

User -> AuthServer: enter credentials

alt credentials correct
  AuthServer -> AuthServer: verify credentials
  AuthServer --> Client: authorization code

  Client -> AuthServer: exchange code via callback
  AuthServer --> Client: access token

  par
    AuthServer ->> AuditLog: note issuance
  end

  opt requested scope includes profile
    Client -> ResourceServer: retrieve user data
    ResourceServer -> AuthServer: re-verify token
    AuthServer --> ResourceServer: verification result
    ResourceServer --> Client: user data
  end

else credentials wrong
  destroy SessionStore
  AuthServer -> SessionStore: discard session
  AuthServer --> User: error message
end

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model
import dev.kuml.kerml.KermlMultiplicity

sysml2Model(name = "Bicycle System BDD") {
    val frame = partDef(name = "Frame")
    val crank = partDef(name = "Crank")
    val chain = partDef(name = "Chain")
    val rearWheel = partDef(name = "Rear Wheel")
    val handlebars = partDef(name = "Handlebars")
    val frontWheel = partDef(name = "Front Wheel")
    val brakingSystem = partDef(name = "Braking System")

    val drivetrain = partDef(name = "Drivetrain") {
        part(name = "crank", typeId = crank.id)
        part(name = "chain", typeId = chain.id)
        part(name = "rearWheel", typeId = rearWheel.id)
    }

    val steeringAssembly = partDef(name = "Steering Assembly") {
        part(name = "handlebars", typeId = handlebars.id)
        part(name = "frontWheel", typeId = frontWheel.id)
    }

    val bicycleSystem = partDef(name = "Bicycle System") {
        part(name = "frame", typeId = frame.id)
        part(name = "drivetrain", typeId = drivetrain.id)
        part(name = "steeringAssembly", typeId = steeringAssembly.id)
        part(name = "brakingSystem", typeId = brakingSystem.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "Bicycle System BDD") {
        include(bicycleSystem)
        include(frame)
        include(drivetrain)
        include(steeringAssembly)
        include(brakingSystem)
        include(crank)
        include(chain)
        include(rearWheel)
        include(handlebars)
        include(frontWheel)
    }
}

' SysML 2 BDD: Bicycle system

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model
import dev.kuml.kerml.KermlMultiplicity

sysml2Model(name = "RobotArm") {
    val base = partDef(name = "Base")
    val endEffector = partDef(name = "EndEffector")
    val joint = partDef(name = "Joint", isAbstract = true)
    val revoluteJoint = partDef(name = "RevoluteJoint", specializesId = joint.id)
    val prismaticJoint = partDef(name = "PrismaticJoint", specializesId = joint.id)
    val arm = partDef(name = "Arm") {
        part(name = "base", typeId = base.id)
        part(name = "joints", typeId = joint.id, multiplicity = KermlMultiplicity(1, 6))
        part(name = "endEffector", typeId = endEffector.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "RobotArm BDD") {
        include(arm)
        include(base)
        include(joint)
        include(revoluteJoint)
        include(prismaticJoint)
        include(endEffector)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model
import dev.kuml.kerml.KermlMultiplicity

sysml2Model(name = "ADAS Subsystem BDD") {
    val sensor = partDef(name = "Sensor", isAbstract = true)
    val camera = partDef(name = "Camera", specializesId = sensor.id)
    val radar = partDef(name = "Radar", specializesId = sensor.id)
    val lidar = partDef(name = "Lidar", specializesId = sensor.id)

    val sensorSuite = partDef(name = "SensorSuite") {
        part(name = "cameras", typeId = camera.id, multiplicity = KermlMultiplicity.ONE_OR_MORE)
        part(name = "radars", typeId = radar.id, multiplicity = KermlMultiplicity.ONE_OR_MORE)
        part(name = "lidars", typeId = lidar.id, multiplicity = KermlMultiplicity.ONE_OR_MORE)
    }

    val environmentModel = partDef(name = "EnvironmentModel")

    val fusionUnit = partDef(name = "FusionAndProcessingUnit") {
        part(name = "environmentModel", typeId = environmentModel.id)
    }

    val steeringSystem = partDef(name = "SteeringSystem")
    val brakingSystem = partDef(name = "BrakingSystem")

    val controlUnit = partDef(name = "DriverAssistanceControlUnit")

    val adasSubsystem = partDef(name = "ADASSubsystem") {
        part(name = "sensorSuite", typeId = sensorSuite.id)
        part(name = "fusionUnit", typeId = fusionUnit.id)
        part(name = "controlUnit", typeId = controlUnit.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "ADAS Subsystem BDD") {
        include(sensor)
        include(camera)
        include(radar)
        include(lidar)
        include(sensorSuite)
        include(environmentModel)
        include(fusionUnit)
        include(steeringSystem)
        include(brakingSystem)
        include(controlUnit)
        include(adasSubsystem)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model
import dev.kuml.kerml.KermlMultiplicity

sysml2Model(name = "AUTOSAR ECU") {
    // Hardware layer
    val cpuCore = partDef(name = "CPU Core")
    val ram = partDef(name = "RAM")
    val flashMemory = partDef(name = "Flash Memory")

    val communicationController = partDef(name = "Communication Controller", isAbstract = true)
    val canController = partDef(name = "CAN Controller", specializesId = communicationController.id)
    val linController = partDef(name = "LIN Controller", specializesId = communicationController.id)
    val ethernetController = partDef(name = "Ethernet Controller", specializesId = communicationController.id)

    val microcontroller = partDef(name = "Microcontroller") {
        part(name = "cpuCore", typeId = cpuCore.id)
        part(name = "ram", typeId = ram.id)
        part(name = "flashMemory", typeId = flashMemory.id)
        part(name = "communicationControllers", typeId = communicationController.id, multiplicity = KermlMultiplicity.ONE_OR_MORE)
    }

    // AUTOSAR BSW layer
    val bswModule = partDef(name = "BSW Module", isAbstract = true)
    val mcal = partDef(name = "MCAL", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    val canCommunicationStack = partDef(name = "CAN Communication Stack", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    val ethernetCommunicationStack = partDef(name = "Ethernet Communication Stack", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    val os = partDef(name = "OS", specializesId = bswModule.id)
    val watchdog = partDef(name = "Watchdog", specializesId = bswModule.id)

    val autosarBsw = partDef(name = "AUTOSAR BSW") {
        part(name = "mcal", typeId = mcal.id)
        part(name = "canCommunicationStack", typeId = canCommunicationStack.id)
        part(name = "ethernetCommunicationStack", typeId = ethernetCommunicationStack.id)
        part(name = "os", typeId = os.id)
        part(name = "watchdog", typeId = watchdog.id)
    }

    // Application layer
    val virtualFunctionalBus = partDef(name = "Virtual Functional Bus")
    val softwareComponent = partDef(name = "Software Component")

    val applicationLayer = partDef(name = "Application Layer") {
        part(name = "virtualFunctionalBus", typeId = virtualFunctionalBus.id)
        part(name = "softwareComponents", typeId = softwareComponent.id, multiplicity = KermlMultiplicity.ONE_OR_MORE)
    }

    // ECU top-level
    val ecu = partDef(name = "ECU") {
        part(name = "microcontroller", typeId = microcontroller.id)
        part(name = "autosarBsw", typeId = autosarBsw.id)
        part(name = "applicationLayer", typeId = applicationLayer.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "AUTOSAR ECU BDD") {
        include(ecu)
        include(microcontroller)
        include(cpuCore)
        include(ram)
        include(flashMemory)
        include(communicationController)
        include(canController)
        include(linController)
        include(ethernetController)
        include(autosarBsw)
        include(bswModule)
        include(mcal)
        include(canCommunicationStack)
        include(ethernetCommunicationStack)
        include(os)
        include(watchdog)
        include(applicationLayer)
        include(virtualFunctionalBus)
        include(softwareComponent)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model
import dev.kuml.kerml.KermlMultiplicity

sysml2Model(name = "Earth Observation Satellite") {
    // Payload subsystem
    val payloadInstrument = partDef(name = "Payload Instrument", isAbstract = true)
    val opticalCamera = partDef(name = "Optical Camera", specializesId = payloadInstrument.id)
    val sarRadar = partDef(name = "SAR Radar", specializesId = payloadInstrument.id)
    val payloadSubsystem = partDef(name = "Payload Subsystem") {
        part(name = "opticalCamera", typeId = opticalCamera.id)
        part(name = "sarRadar", typeId = sarRadar.id)
    }

    // Structure and thermal control
    val primaryStructure = partDef(name = "Primary Structure")
    val solarPanels = partDef(name = "Solar Panels")
    val heatShield = partDef(name = "Heat Shield")
    val structureThermalControl = partDef(name = "Structure and Thermal Control") {
        part(name = "primaryStructure", typeId = primaryStructure.id)
        part(name = "solarPanels", typeId = solarPanels.id)
        part(name = "heatShield", typeId = heatShield.id)
    }

    // Electrical power supply
    val batteryArray = partDef(name = "Battery Array")
    val solarPowerRegulator = partDef(name = "Solar Power Regulator")
    val pdu = partDef(name = "PDU")
    val electricalPowerSupply = partDef(name = "Electrical Power Supply") {
        part(name = "batteryArray", typeId = batteryArray.id)
        part(name = "solarPowerRegulator", typeId = solarPowerRegulator.id)
        part(name = "pdu", typeId = pdu.id)
    }

    // Attitude and Orbit Control System (AOCS)
    val starSensor = partDef(name = "Star Sensor")
    val reactionWheels = partDef(name = "Reaction Wheels")
    val thrusters = partDef(name = "Thrusters")
    val aocs = partDef(name = "AOCS") {
        part(name = "starSensor", typeId = starSensor.id)
        part(name = "reactionWheels", typeId = reactionWheels.id)
        part(name = "thrusters", typeId = thrusters.id)
    }

    // Telemetry, Tracking & Command (TT&C)
    val onBoardComputer = partDef(name = "On-Board Computer")
    val rfTransmitter = partDef(name = "RF Transmitter")
    val rfReceiver = partDef(name = "RF Receiver")
    val ttc = partDef(name = "TT&C") {
        part(name = "onBoardComputer", typeId = onBoardComputer.id)
        part(name = "rfTransmitter", typeId = rfTransmitter.id)
        part(name = "rfReceiver", typeId = rfReceiver.id)
    }

    // Satellite (top-level system) composed of the five independent subsystems
    val satellite = partDef(name = "Earth Observation Satellite") {
        part(name = "payloadSubsystem", typeId = payloadSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "structureThermalControl", typeId = structureThermalControl.id)
        part(name = "electricalPowerSupply", typeId = electricalPowerSupply.id)
        part(name = "aocs", typeId = aocs.id)
        part(name = "ttc", typeId = ttc.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "Earth Observation Satellite BDD") {
        include(satellite)
        include(payloadSubsystem)
        include(payloadInstrument)
        include(opticalCamera)
        include(sarRadar)
        include(structureThermalControl)
        include(primaryStructure)
        include(solarPanels)
        include(heatShield)
        include(electricalPowerSupply)
        include(batteryArray)
        include(solarPowerRegulator)
        include(pdu)
        include(aocs)
        include(starSensor)
        include(reactionWheels)
        include(thrusters)
        include(ttc)
        include(onBoardComputer)
        include(rfTransmitter)
        include(rfReceiver)
    }
}
